message.content:
You are implementing Tasks 5, 8, and 9 together (they all modify the same call chain).

## Task 5: gRPC Client — listManagedSpaceForMigration 解析 folders

**File:** `D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server\src\main\java\com\yottastudios\ns\collabspace\grpc\impl\CollabspaceGrpcClientServiceImpl.java`

Modify `listManagedSpaceForMigration` method (around line 123). Replace the current `.map()` lambda to also parse `folders`:

Replace this part:
```java
return result.getSpacesList().stream()
        .map(spaceInfo -> SpaceVo.builder()
                .spaceId(spaceInfo.getSpaceId())
                .name(spaceInfo.getName())
                .owner(spaceInfo.getOwner())
                .apps(spaceAppRelService.listBySpaceId(spaceInfo.getSpaceId()).stream().map(SpaceAppRelVo::new).toList())
                .build())
        .collect(Collectors.toList());
```

With:
```java
return result.getSpacesList().stream()
        .map(spaceInfo -> SpaceVo.builder()
                .spaceId(spaceInfo.getSpaceId())
                .name(spaceInfo.getName())
                .owner(spaceInfo.getOwner())
                .apps(spaceAppRelService.listBySpaceId(spaceInfo.getSpaceId()).stream().map(SpaceAppRelVo::new).toList())
                .folders(convertGrpcFolders(spaceInfo.getFoldersList()))
                .build())
        .collect(Collectors.toList());
```

Add this private method:
```java
private List<FolderTreeNodeVo> convertGrpcFolders(List<SpaceNodeTreeNode> grpcNodes) {
    if (grpcNodes == null || grpcNodes.isEmpty()) {
        return List.of();
    }
    return grpcNodes.stream()
            .map(node -> FolderTreeNodeVo.builder()
                    .id(node.getId())
                    .name(node.getName())
                    .children(convertGrpcFolders(node.getChildrenList()))
                    .build())
            .toList();
}
```

Add import:
```java
import com.yottastudios.ns.collabspace.space.vo.FolderTreeNodeVo;
```

---

## Task 8: Manager 实现 — targetParentNodeId 透传

**File:** `D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server\src\main\java\com\yottastudios\ns\collabspace\workspace\manager\update\impl\SpaceNodeMigrationUpdateManagerImpl.java`

The interface signatures have already been changed (Task 7). Now update the implementation.

### Modify `createMigrationTask` method signature and body:

Change signature from:
```java
public String createMigrationTask(List<Long> spaceNodeIds, String targetSpaceId, String sourceSpaceId, Long userId, Boolean isRemained) {
```
to:
```java
public String createMigrationTask(List<Long> spaceNodeIds, String targetSpaceId, String sourceSpaceId, Long userId, Boolean isRemained, Long targetParentNodeId) {
```

In the body, change the gRPC call:
```java
taskId = collabspaceGrpcClientService.createSpaceNodeMigrationTask(spaceNodeTree, email, targetSpaceId, sourceSpaceId, sourceSpaceApps);
```
to:
```java
taskId = collabspaceGrpcClientService.createSpaceNodeMigrationTask(spaceNodeTree, email, targetSpaceId, sourceSpaceId, sourceSpaceApps, targetParentNodeId);
```

And change the acceptMigrationTask call:
```java
taskId = acceptMigrationTask(spaceNodeTree, email, targetSpaceId, sourceSpaceId, sourceSpaceApps,
        MigrationTypeEnum.INTRA_SERVER.getValue(), isRemained);
```
to:
```java
taskId = acceptMigrationTask(spaceNodeTree, email, targetSpaceId, sourceSpaceId, sourceSpaceApps,
        MigrationTypeEnum.INTRA_SERVER.getValue(), isRemained, targetParentNodeId);
```

Add `targetParentNodeId` to the log:
```java
log.info("createMigrationTask: taskId={}, sourceNodeIds={}, targetSpaceId={}, sourceSpaceId={}, userId={}, targetParentNodeId={}, filteredTreeSize={}",
        taskId, spaceNodeIds, targetSpaceId, sourceSpaceId, userId, targetParentNodeId, spaceNodeTree.size());
```

### Modify `acceptMigrationTask` method signature and body:

Change signature from:
```java
public String acceptMigrationTask(List<TreeNode<SpaceNodeVo>> spaceNodeTree, String email, String targetSpaceId,
                                  String sourceSpaceId, List<SpaceAppRelVo> appRels, Integer migrationType, Boolean isRemained) {
```
to:
```java
public String acceptMigrationTask(List<TreeNode<SpaceNodeVo>> spaceNodeTree, String email, String targetSpaceId,
                                  String sourceSpaceId, List<SpaceAppRelVo> appRels, Integer migrationType, Boolean isRemained, Long targetParentNodeId) {
```

In the entity builder, add:
```java
.targetParentNodeId(targetParentNodeId)
```

Update the log to include targetParentNodeId:
```java
log.info("acceptMigrationTask: taskId={}, email={}, targetSpaceId={}, sourceSpaceId={}, targetParentNodeId={}, treeSize={}",
        taskId, email, targetSpaceId, sourceSpaceId, targetParentNodeId, spaceNodeTree.size());
```

---

## Task 9: gRPC Client — createSpaceNodeMigrationTask 透传 targetParentNodeId

**Same file as Task 5:** `CollabspaceGrpcClientServiceImpl.java`

### Also modify the interface:
**File:** `D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-server\src\main\java\com\yottastudios\ns\collabspace\grpc\ICollabspaceGrpcClientService.java`

Change method signature from:
```java
String createSpaceNodeMigrationTask(List<TreeNode<SpaceNodeVo>> spaceNodeTree, String email, String targetSpaceId, String sourceSpaceId, List<SpaceAppRelVo> sourceSpaceApps);
```
to:
```java
String createSpaceNodeMigrationTask(List<TreeNode<SpaceNodeVo>> spaceNodeTree, String email, String targetSpaceId, String sourceSpaceId, List<SpaceAppRelVo> sourceSpaceApps, Long targetParentNodeId);
```

### Modify implementation in CollabspaceGrpcClientServiceImpl:

Change method signature from:
```java
public String createSpaceNodeMigrationTask(List<TreeNode<SpaceNodeVo>> spaceNodeTree, String email, String targetSpaceId, String sourceSpaceId, List<SpaceAppRelVo> sourceSpaceApps) {
```
to:
```java
public String createSpaceNodeMigrationTask(List<TreeNode<SpaceNodeVo>> spaceNodeTree, String email, String targetSpaceId, String sourceSpaceId, List<SpaceAppRelVo> sourceSpaceApps, Long targetParentNodeId) {
```

Change the request building from:
```java
CreateSpaceNodeMigrationTaskRequest request = CreateSpaceNodeMigrationTaskRequest.newBuilder()
        .addAllSpaceNodeTree(grpcTreeNodes)
        .setEmail(email)
        .setTargetSpaceId(targetSpaceId)
        .setSourceSpaceId(sourceSpaceId)
        .addAllSourceSpaceApps(grpcSpaceApps)
        .build();
```
to:
```java
CreateSpaceNodeMigrationTaskRequest.Builder requestBuilder = CreateSpaceNodeMigrationTaskRequest.newBuilder()
        .addAllSpaceNodeTree(grpcTreeNodes)
        .setEmail(email)
        .setTargetSpaceId(targetSpaceId)
        .setSourceSpaceId(sourceSpaceId)
        .addAllSourceSpaceApps(grpcSpaceApps);

if (targetParentNodeId != null) {
    requestBuilder.setTargetParentNodeId(targetParentNodeId);
}

CreateSpaceNodeMigrationTaskResult result = collabspacePrivateStub.createSpaceNodeMigrationTask(requestBuilder.build());
```

Update log to include targetParentNodeId:
```java
log.info("createSpaceNodeMigrationTask success: taskId={}, email={}, targetSpaceId={}, sourceSpaceId={}, targetParentNodeId={}, treeSize={}",
        result.getTaskId(), email, targetSpaceId, sourceSpaceId, targetParentNodeId, spaceNodeTree.size());
```

---

Do NOT commit. Report back when done.

## 改动总结

**3个文件被修改，共涉及以下变更：**

### Task 5 — `CollabspaceGrpcClientServiceImpl.java`
- `listManagedSpaceForMigration` 的 `.map()` 中新增 `.folders(convertGrpcFolders(spaceInfo.getFoldersList()))`
- 新增私有方法 `convertGrpcFolders(List<SpaceNodeTreeNode> grpcNodes)`，递归将 proto `SpaceNodeTreeNode` 转换为 `FolderTreeNodeVo` 树
- 新增 import `FolderTreeNodeVo`

### Task 9 — `ICollabspaceGrpcClientService.java` + `CollabspaceGrpcClientServiceImpl.java`
- 接口 `createSpaceNodeMigrationTask` 签名新增参数 `Long targetParentNodeId`
- 实现类同步修改签名，将 `request` 构建从直接 `.build()` 改为先用 `Builder`，当 `targetParentNodeId != null` 时才调用 `requestBuilder.setTargetParentNodeId(...)`（避免传 null 给 proto long 字段）
- 日志新增 `targetParentNodeId={}` 字段

### Task 8 — `SpaceNodeMigrationUpdateManagerImpl.java`
- `createMigrationTask` 签名新增参数 `Long targetParentNodeId`，并将其透传给 `createSpaceNodeMigrationTask` 和 `acceptMigrationTask` 两个调用分支
- `acceptMigrationTask` 签名新增参数 `Long targetParentNodeId`，entity builder 新增 `.targetParentNodeId(targetParentNodeId)`
- 两个方法的日志均新增 `targetParentNodeId={}` 字段
